title: How to Brief an AI Agent for Real Work That Gets Done
titleCandidates: How to Brief an AI Agent for Real Work That Gets Done
Stop Writing Vague Prompts: Build an Agent Task Brief
The Agent Task Brief: 6 Fields for Better AI Work
thumbnailText: GIVE YOUR AGENT A REAL BRIEF
secondaryKeywords: how to brief an AI agent
description:
A good AI agent handoff starts with real work, not a blank prompt box. This video turns source materials, constraints, review standards, and delivery requirements into one reusable Agent Task Brief.

What you'll learn:
- How to define a concrete artifact before asking the agent to act
- How to package the smallest complete source set and make boundaries explicit
- How to write review standards, destination format, and handoff evidence into one brief

Chapters:
00:00 Introduction
01:07 Artifact First
02:45 Source Material
04:24 Constraints
05:59 Review Standards
07:34 Destination Format
09:07 Task Brief
10:42 Summary

Follow Tiny Agent. Tiny Agent helps you get better at using AI.
